label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 8

extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSEN Fabio won the sprint after skipping the intermediate sprint to conserve position, taking green jersey from PHILIPSEN on countback.
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck attempted splits 30km out using crosswinds but elite GC riders like Nielsen got caught showing vulnerability.
Jakobsen deliberately skipped intermediate sprint while Philipsen contested it, preserving leadout train positioning for finale superiority.
SENECHAL Florian's extended leadout caused Merlier to lose contact with own train, revealing Quick-Step pace superiority fractures rival teams.

rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: Won after strategic intermediate sprint skip, indicating superior race craft over raw speed rival Philipsen
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: neutral: Won intermediate sprint but third in finale suggests contesting bonuses compromises final positioning
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: negative: Unable to hold position behind own leadout man, indicating fitness deficit on this sprint-heavy Vuelta
rider_signals.NIELSEN Magnus Cort: negative: Caught out in 30km crosswind split despite being elite GC-capable rider, poor positioning awareness
rider_signals.SENECHAL Florian: positive: Extended high-pace leadout shattered field organization, exceptional domestique performance
